## UX scope

User journeys, screens, CLI workflows, API ergonomics, or documentation flows.

## Data scope

Data sources, data contracts, quality checks, batch or streaming decisions, and expected scale.

## Systems scope

Runtime, CI/CD, environment, operational, and security-adjacent concerns.

## Documentation scope

Docs that must be created or updated.
